components.name: accordion
components.description: Sitecore EDS Accordion component built on Bootstrap 5 collapse. Renders a vertical stack of expandable items, each with a header button (optional icon image plus rich-text title) and a collapsible rich-text body; expand/collapse indicator can be plus/minus or chevron.
